What's waiting for you

Everything a long stay needs, already here.

No half-stocked rentals. Move in, cook a real meal, stream a movie, sleep well — the suite is set up like a home, not a hotel room.

Inside the suite

Room by room.

Real photos of the unit — the living area, dining nook, kitchen and both bedrooms.

01 · Living area

A soft place to land

An L-shaped sofa, mounted TV with Netflix, and the water dispenser within arm's reach. Open-plan, so the room never feels boxed in.

02 · Dining area

Set for four

A solid-wood table dressed for a proper meal — seats four comfortably, right beside the kitchen so serving is effortless.

03 · Kitchen

Cook like you're home

Induction cooktop, kettle and rice cooker, microwave, full set of plates, bowls and glassware — stocked cabinets and a real sink. Bring groceries, not takeout.

04 · Bedrooms

Two rooms, both air-conditioned

Two private bedrooms with their own aircon and window blinds — comfortable for a couple, a small family, or friends sharing the stay.
